name: zygos-vscodium
description: Connect to any remote machine via SSH from VSCodium, code-oss, or VSCodium-OSS. Open folders on remote hosts, run a full IDE-backed server, and chain into devcontainers - all over a stock ssh binary. Zero-config for VSCodium; customizable for forks and custom builds.

zygos.serverDownload.markdownDescription:
**Use the [configuration wizard](command:zygos.configureServerDownload) instead of editing here.** The wizard provides auto-detection, fork templates, a test button, and guided setup.

Advanced: this object holds `mode` ("auto" or "custom"), `template` (URL template, used when mode is custom), and `binaryName` (override for server binary name).
